title: Bolognese Sauce
excerpt: Ingredients 20 ml oil 2 onions, finely chopped 3 celery stalks, sliced 4 garlic cloves, crushed 4 chillies, finely chopped or to taste 3 carrots, thinly sliced 750 g good beef mince 400 g tin tomato purée 250 ml red wine 100g tomato paste Sugar to taste 80 ml Worcestershire sauce 80 ml Chinese black bean chilli sauce …
html:
Ingredients

  • 20 ml oil
  • 2 onions, finely chopped
  • 3 celery stalks, sliced
  • 4 garlic cloves, crushed
  • 4 chillies, finely chopped or to taste
  • 3 carrots, thinly sliced
  • 750 g good beef mince
  • 400 g tin tomato purée
  • 250 ml red wine
  • 100g tomato paste
  • Sugar to taste
  • 80 ml Worcestershire sauce
  • 80 ml Chinese black bean chilli sauce (LaoGanMa)
  • Salt and pepper

Method

Heat the oil in a deep pan, and fry the onions until translucent. Add the celery, garlic, chillies and carrots to the onions and fry further. Add the mince and fry until browned. Add the rest of the ingredients, lower the heat and let it simmer slowly until it has a beautiful deep red colour.

Serve over pasta.

Easy!
